description: Semantic mapping for Oracle EBS Order Management tables to business concepts.

tables.description: Stores header-level information for sales orders, return orders, and quotes.

columns.name: HEADER_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the order header (Primary Key).

columns.name: ORDER_NUMBER
columns.description: The user-visible sales order number.

columns.name: ORDER_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to OE_TRANSACTION_TYPES_ALL (order type/category).

columns.name: ORDER_SOURCE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to OE_ORDER_SOURCES (origin of the order, e.g., web, EDI).

columns.name: ORDERED_DATE
columns.description: The date the order was placed.

columns.name: STATUS_CODE
columns.description: Lifecycle status: BOOKED, ENTERED, CANCELLED, CLOSED.

columns.name: BOOKED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether the order has been booked (Y/N).

columns.name: CANCELLED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether the order has been cancelled (Y/N).

columns.name: SOLD_TO_ORG_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS (the bill-to customer account).

columns.name: INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_CUST_SITE_USES_ALL (the invoice/bill-to site use).

columns.name: SHIP_TO_ORG_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_CUST_SITE_USES_ALL (the ship-to site use).

columns.name: PRICE_LIST_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to QP_LIST_HEADERS_B (the price list applied to the order).

columns.name: PAYMENT_TERM_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to RA_TERMS (payment terms, e.g., Net 30).

columns.name: SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE
columns.description: The freight/shipping method (e.g., FedEx, UPS, Standard).

columns.name: FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE
columns.description: Freight responsibility terms (e.g., PREPAID, COLLECT).

columns.name: FOB_POINT_CODE
columns.description: Free On Board point (e.g., ORIGIN, DESTINATION).

columns.name: SALESREP_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to RA_SALESREPS_ALL (the responsible salesperson).

columns.name: CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Currency of the order (e.g., USD, EUR).

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier.

columns.name: REQUEST_DATE
columns.description: The customer's requested delivery date.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_PO_NUMBER
columns.description: The customer's own purchase order reference number.

tables.description: Stores line-level details for sales orders, including item, quantity, pricing, and fulfillment status.

columns.name: LINE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the order line (Primary Key).

columns.name: HEADER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.

columns.name: LINE_NUMBER
columns.description: The sequential line number on the order.

columns.name: SHIPMENT_NUMBER
columns.description: Shipment split number (usually 1 unless a line is split).

columns.name: ITEM_TYPE_CODE
columns.description: Type of item on the line: STANDARD, MODEL, CLASS, OPTION, KIT, SERVICE.

columns.name: INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B (the item ordered).

columns.name: SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to MTL_PARAMETERS / HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS (the warehouse fulfilling the order).

columns.name: SHIP_TO_ORG_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_CUST_SITE_USES_ALL (ship-to address for this line).

columns.name: INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_CUST_SITE_USES_ALL (bill-to address for this line).

columns.name: ORDERED_QUANTITY
columns.description: Quantity ordered by the customer.

columns.name: SHIPPED_QUANTITY
columns.description: Quantity that has been shipped.

columns.name: INVOICED_QUANTITY
columns.description: Quantity that has been invoiced.

columns.name: CANCELLED_QUANTITY
columns.description: Quantity that has been cancelled.

columns.name: UNIT_SELLING_PRICE
columns.description: The actual selling price per unit after any discounts.

columns.name: UNIT_LIST_PRICE
columns.description: The list price per unit before discounts.

columns.name: TAX_CODE
columns.description: Tax code applied to the line.

columns.name: LINE_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to OE_TRANSACTION_TYPES_ALL (line type, e.g., Bill Only, Ship Only).

columns.name: SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE
columns.description: The scheduled ship date for the line.

columns.name: REQUEST_DATE
columns.description: The customer's requested delivery date for this line.

columns.name: PROMISE_DATE
columns.description: The date promised to the customer for delivery.

columns.name: ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE
columns.description: The actual date the line was shipped.

columns.name: FLOW_STATUS_CODE
columns.description: Current fulfillment status: ENTERED, BOOKED, AWAITING_SHIPPING, SHIPPED, INVOICED, CANCELLED, CLOSED.

columns.name: OPEN_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates if the line is open (Y) or closed/cancelled (N).

columns.name: BOOKED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates if the line has been booked (Y/N).

columns.name: CANCELLED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates if the line has been cancelled (Y/N).

columns.name: RETURN_REASON_CODE
columns.description: Reason code for return lines (RMA).

columns.name: UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE
columns.description: The ordering unit of measure.

columns.name: PRICE_LIST_ID
columns.description: Price list used for pricing this line.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier.

tables.description: Defines order and line transaction types (e.g., Standard Order, Return RMA, Mixed Order).

columns.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the transaction type (Primary Key).

columns.name: NAME
columns.description: The name of the order or line type (e.g., Standard, RMA).

columns.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE
columns.description: Indicates whether this is a header (ORDER) or line (LINE) type.

columns.name: ORDER_CATEGORY_CODE
columns.description: Category of the order: ORDER or RETURN.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier.

tables.description: Stores customer account information in the Trading Community Architecture (TCA).

columns.name: CUST_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the customer account (Primary Key).

columns.name: PARTY_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_PARTIES (the underlying party/entity).

columns.name: ACCOUNT_NUMBER
columns.description: The customer account number (user-visible).

columns.name: ACCOUNT_NAME
columns.description: The name of the customer account.

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Status of the account: A (Active), I (Inactive).

columns.name: CUSTOMER_TYPE
columns.description: Type: R (External), I (Internal).

tables.description: The central TCA entity storing all party records including customers, contacts, and organizations.

columns.name: PARTY_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the party (Primary Key).

columns.name: PARTY_NUMBER
columns.description: The party number (user-visible unique identifier).

columns.name: PARTY_NAME
columns.description: The name of the party (e.g., company or person name).

columns.name: PARTY_TYPE
columns.description: Type of party: ORGANIZATION, PERSON, GROUP, RELATIONSHIP.

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Status of the party: A (Active), I (Inactive), M (Merged).

tables.description: Stores the business purposes (site uses) assigned to customer account sites, such as BILL_TO and SHIP_TO.

columns.name: SITE_USE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the site use (Primary Key). This is the value stored as SHIP_TO_ORG_ID on orders.

columns.name: CUST_ACCT_SITE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.

columns.name: SITE_USE_CODE
columns.description: The purpose of the site: BILL_TO, SHIP_TO, DELIVER_TO, STATEMENTS.

columns.name: LOCATION
columns.description: Location code/name for the site use.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier.

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Status: A (Active), I (Inactive).

tables.description: Links a customer account to a physical party site (address).

columns.name: CUST_ACCT_SITE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the customer account site (Primary Key).

columns.name: CUST_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.

columns.name: PARTY_SITE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_PARTY_SITES (the physical address).

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier.

tables.description: Links a party to a physical location/address.

columns.name: PARTY_SITE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the party site (Primary Key).

columns.name: PARTY_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_PARTIES.

columns.name: LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_LOCATIONS (the physical address detail).

columns.name: PARTY_SITE_NUMBER
columns.description: The party site number.

tables.description: Stores physical address details for parties and sites.

columns.name: LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the location (Primary Key).

columns.name: ADDRESS1
columns.description: Address line 1.

columns.name: ADDRESS2
columns.description: Address line 2.

columns.name: CITY
columns.description: City.

columns.name: STATE
columns.description: State or province.

columns.name: POSTAL_CODE
columns.description: ZIP or postal code.

columns.name: COUNTRY
columns.description: ISO country code (e.g., US, GB, CA).

tables.description: Stores shipped line details including quantities and shipping status for fulfillment of order lines.

columns.name: DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the delivery detail (Primary Key).

columns.name: SOURCE_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL (the source sales order).

columns.name: SOURCE_LINE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL (the source order line).

columns.name: SOURCE_CODE
columns.description: Module generating the detail, typically OE for Order Management.

columns.name: INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: The shipping warehouse organization.

columns.name: REQUESTED_QUANTITY
columns.description: Quantity requested to ship.

columns.name: SHIPPED_QUANTITY
columns.description: Actual quantity shipped.

columns.name: RELEASED_STATUS
columns.description: Pick release status: N=Not Released, R=Ready to Release, S=Released to Warehouse, Y=Staged, C=Shipped, D=Cancelled, B=Backordered.

columns.name: SUBINVENTORY
columns.description: The subinventory from which the item is shipped.

columns.name: LOT_NUMBER
columns.description: Lot number for lot-controlled items.

columns.name: SERIAL_NUMBER
columns.description: Serial number for serial-controlled items.

columns.name: UNIT_OF_MEASURE
columns.description: Unit of measure for the shipped quantity.

tables.description: Represents a shipment delivery grouping one or more delivery details shipped together.

columns.name: DELIVERY_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the delivery (Primary Key).

columns.name: NAME
columns.description: The delivery name or number.

columns.name: STATUS_CODE
columns.description: Delivery status: OP=Open, PA=Picked/Packed, CL=Closed/Shipped, CO=Contents Unknown, IT=In Transit, SA=Arrived.

columns.name: SHIP_METHOD_CODE
columns.description: The freight/carrier method used for this delivery.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: The shipping organization.

columns.name: SHIP_DATE_ACTUAL
columns.description: The actual date and time the delivery was shipped.

columns.name: WAYBILL
columns.description: Tracking number or waybill for the shipment.

columns.name: GROSS_WEIGHT
columns.description: Total gross weight of the delivery.

columns.name: WEIGHT_UOM_CODE
columns.description: Unit of measure for the weight.

tables.description: Links delivery details (order lines) to their parent delivery.

columns.name: DELIVERY_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier (Primary Key).

columns.name: DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS.

columns.name: DELIVERY_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.

tables.description: Stores pricing adjustments (discounts, surcharges, promotions) applied to order headers or lines.

columns.name: PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the price adjustment (Primary Key).

columns.name: HEADER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.

columns.name: LINE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL (NULL if header-level adjustment).

columns.name: LIST_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to QP_LIST_HEADERS_B (the pricing rule applied).

columns.name: LIST_LINE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to QP_LIST_LINES (the specific discount line).

columns.name: ADJUSTED_AMOUNT
columns.description: The monetary value of the adjustment.

columns.name: PERCENT
columns.description: The discount or surcharge percentage.

columns.name: ARITHMETIC_OPERATOR
columns.description: How the adjustment is applied: % (percent), AMT (amount), LUMPSUM.

columns.name: APPLIED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates if the adjustment was actually applied (Y/N).

common_joins.description: Link Order Lines to Order Header
Link Order Header to Customer Account
Link Customer Account to Party (for customer name)
Link Ship-To Site Use to Customer Account Site
Link Customer Account Site to Physical Address
Link Order Line to Item Master
Link Delivery Detail to Order Line
Link Delivery Detail to Delivery (for shipment tracking)
Link Order Header to Order Type
Link Price Adjustments to Order Line

example_queries.description: Get all booked sales orders with customer name for a given date range.
example_queries.sql: SELECT h.ORDER_NUMBER, p.PARTY_NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME, ca.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, h.ORDERED_DATE, h.CURRENCY_CODE, h.STATUS_CODE FROM OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL h JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS ca ON h.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID = ca.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID JOIN HZ_PARTIES p ON ca.PARTY_ID = p.PARTY_ID WHERE h.BOOKED_FLAG = 'Y' AND h.CANCELLED_FLAG = 'N' AND h.ORDERED_DATE BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date AND h.ORG_ID = :org_id ORDER BY h.ORDERED_DATE DESC

example_queries.description: Get all open order lines with item details, quantities, and fulfillment status.
example_queries.sql: SELECT h.ORDER_NUMBER, l.LINE_NUMBER, i.SEGMENT1 AS ITEM_NUMBER, i.DESCRIPTION AS ITEM_DESCRIPTION, l.ORDERED_QUANTITY, l.SHIPPED_QUANTITY, (l.ORDERED_QUANTITY - NVL(l.SHIPPED_QUANTITY, 0) - NVL(l.CANCELLED_QUANTITY, 0)) AS QTY_OUTSTANDING, l.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE, l.FLOW_STATUS_CODE, l.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE FROM OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL l JOIN OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL h ON l.HEADER_ID = h.HEADER_ID JOIN MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B i ON l.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = i.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AND l.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID = i.ORGANIZATION_ID WHERE l.OPEN_FLAG = 'Y' AND l.CANCELLED_FLAG = 'N' AND h.ORG_ID = :org_id ORDER BY l.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE

example_queries.description: Get total order value by customer for a given period (top customers).
example_queries.sql: SELECT p.PARTY_NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT h.HEADER_ID) AS NUM_ORDERS, SUM(l.ORDERED_QUANTITY * l.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE) AS TOTAL_ORDER_VALUE, h.CURRENCY_CODE FROM OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL h JOIN OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL l ON h.HEADER_ID = l.HEADER_ID JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS ca ON h.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID = ca.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID JOIN HZ_PARTIES p ON ca.PARTY_ID = p.PARTY_ID WHERE h.BOOKED_FLAG = 'Y' AND h.ORDERED_DATE BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date AND h.ORG_ID = :org_id AND l.CANCELLED_FLAG = 'N' GROUP BY p.PARTY_NAME, h.CURRENCY_CODE ORDER BY TOTAL_ORDER_VALUE DESC

example_queries.description: Get shipment tracking information for a specific sales order.
example_queries.sql: SELECT h.ORDER_NUMBER, l.LINE_NUMBER, d.NAME AS DELIVERY_NAME, d.WAYBILL, d.SHIP_DATE_ACTUAL, d.STATUS_CODE AS DELIVERY_STATUS, wdd.SHIPPED_QUANTITY, d.SHIP_METHOD_CODE FROM OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL h JOIN OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL l ON h.HEADER_ID = l.HEADER_ID JOIN WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS wdd ON wdd.SOURCE_LINE_ID = l.LINE_ID AND wdd.SOURCE_CODE = 'OE' JOIN WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNMENTS wda ON wdd.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID = wda.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID JOIN WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES d ON wda.DELIVERY_ID = d.DELIVERY_ID WHERE h.ORDER_NUMBER = :order_number

example_queries.description: Find orders that have not yet shipped past their scheduled ship date (late orders).
example_queries.sql: SELECT h.ORDER_NUMBER, p.PARTY_NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME, l.LINE_NUMBER, i.SEGMENT1 AS ITEM, l.ORDERED_QUANTITY, l.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE, l.FLOW_STATUS_CODE FROM OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL l JOIN OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL h ON l.HEADER_ID = h.HEADER_ID JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS ca ON h.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID = ca.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID JOIN HZ_PARTIES p ON ca.PARTY_ID = p.PARTY_ID JOIN MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B i ON l.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = i.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AND l.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID = i.ORGANIZATION_ID WHERE l.OPEN_FLAG = 'Y' AND l.FLOW_STATUS_CODE NOT IN ('SHIPPED', 'CANCELLED', 'CLOSED', 'INVOICED') AND l.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE < SYSDATE AND h.ORG_ID = :org_id ORDER BY l.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE
